title: The God’s Knights Move on Elbaf
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Nami, Unknown person #6, Ripley, Saul as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Present day

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There's a port on this tree?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Is this a sea... on clouds?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Drop anchor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is the Western Village Port!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And they're sea clouds of course!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Welcome back, Captains!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Your lateness really had us worried!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My Brain is Bugging out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's all so out of this world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How Majestic...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Uwaah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The others are here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Whoa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Check it out!! This is awesome!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Waaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oh my... What's that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Straw hat!! Usoland!! My comrades!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Welcome to Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's "SVair"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's incredible!! What a country!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a mist ship that moves using island clouds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GI-Ko

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The climate here on Elbaf is perfect for all this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Island and sea clouds, sabao bubbles, rainbows, and hovers!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cook at all the technology they have coexisting here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Robin?! Nice hair cut! I figured you'd get one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hehehe, I'm glad you're going to be here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You look like you've gotten well acquainted with Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Long time no see, hajruin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I've been keeping up with your progress!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Emperor already, huh?! As expected of our big boss!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: > 24 introduce everyone later, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...us pour make up the new giant pirates! We're your subordinates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...us five.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's a pleasure:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Where the our choices, Diga GA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even this insular nation was sweeped away with excitement...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...when we heard about big mom's defeat in Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Big Mom?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Linlin and I were friends once, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...she did something that the people of Elbaf consider unforgivable.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Hajrujin!! Save the chit-chat for after our toast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Food and drinks come first!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've prepared a mountain of it for ya!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gaba BA BA BA BA! A mountain to scale with us, I hope!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Let's head for the tavern!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: SouthWest of the Western Village

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm fine going alone, really...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I wanna be there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's a good excuse to sightsee.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not sure if this is a good idea, but I'm not sure if I can't be a fan of the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Me too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Agreed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yipper, food!! I'm starving!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I got so excited, I'm running low on energy too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey, Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hmmm?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mr. Saul did say he wanted to show Robin-chan the library,

dialogue.speaker: Ripley
dialogue.text: So let's head down to the school.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Thanks for guiding us, Gerd.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's no trouble. It's not far!()

dialogue.speaker: Saul
dialogue.text: Forget it, Robin! As Captain...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I got th greet someone who took care of one of my crewmates properly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What? Where did you hear that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's just the right thing to do!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ah, I get it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll save that toast for after you fetch Saul!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'll prep that special moose for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Take your time!!

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 71 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
